'''鈭歯g-d-zh-d''' ('''kangadzhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrocauterize|electrocauterize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrocauterize|electrocauterize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-d-zh-d
|-
! Lemma
| kangadzhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingadzhedoko|thingadzhedoko]] || [[word:jingadzhedoko|jingadzhedoko]] || [[word:shingadzhedoko|shingadzhedoko]] || [[word:kingadzhedoko|kingadzhedoko]]
|-

|-
